name: HIPAA Audit Controls
description: Implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in information systems that contain or use electronic protected health information.
requirement_text: Implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in information systems that contain or use electronic protected health information.

content.notes: This is a required implementation specification with no addressable sub-specs. All ePHI system activity must be logged and reviewable.
